bead.title: doctor and docs: report install layers and document topology
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)

Operators need `ddx doctor` and the shipped docs to explain which install layer is active. The ddx-validate pre-commit hook must keep its scoped behavior so skill-related validation runs only when skill files are staged, regardless of whether skills are installed globally or project-locally. This documentation and diagnostic work should be separate from the install/update/init implementation beads.

ROOT CAUSE
- `cli/cmd/doctor.go:35` owns full doctor execution and must report installation topology without breaking existing health checks.
- `cli/cmd/doctor.go:292` invokes skill install topology reporting, and `cli/cmd/doctor.go:429` renders the global and project layer statuses.
- `cli/cmd/doctor.go:487` is the scoped doctor path used by the ddx-validate hook; it must stay scoped to staged paths rather than running global install checks.
- `docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md:31`, `library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md:37`, `library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md:144`, and `CLAUDE.md:220` are the durable documentation surfaces that must describe install locations and precedence.

PROPOSED FIX
Have `ddx doctor` render two explicit lines for the default `ddx` plugin layer: `Global Install (${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx) â€” ok | missing` and `Project Install (ddxroot.Path()/plugins/ddx) â€” ok | missing | lazy-resolves-to-global`. Preserve `ddx doctor --paths` behavior for ddx-validate so only relevant scoped checks run for staged files. Update or file the topology ADR, `library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md` How this skill works/install topology section, `library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md` if present, and the `CLAUDE.md` Persona System section so they all describe project-local, global, and baked-in precedence.

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a.
- Depends on ddx-06cbaa90 and its home-resolution spec updates.
- Spec impact: `docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-025-or-equivalent` skill install topology, `library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md`, `library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md` if it exists, and `CLAUDE.md` Persona System.

PARENT
- ddx-602ae31a

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90

NON-SCOPE
- Removing the existing per-project install entirely; global and per-project modes coexist.
- Migrating `~/.config/ddx/` legacy paths if any exist.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex-facing `.agents/skills`; add others only when those harnesses define their skill paths.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestDoctor_ReportsBothInstallLayers` asserts `ddx doctor` renders `Global Install (...) â€” ok|missing` and `Project Install (...) â€” ok|missing|lazy-resolves-to-global`.
2. `TestDoctor_ReportsInstallTopology` asserts the project line reports `lazy-resolves-to-global` when the global install exists and the project plugin is absent.
3. `TestDoctorHookPathsDoesNotInvokeFullScope` and `TestDoctorScopedSkillValidationIgnoresInstallLayer` assert the ddx-validate `--paths` flow does not run global or project install topology checks unless staged paths require skill validation.
4. `TestSkillInstallTopologyDocsMentionGlobalProjectAndPrecedence` asserts `docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md`, `library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md`, `library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md`, and `CLAUDE.md` mention project-local installs, global installs, and project > global > baked-in precedence.
5. `ddx skills check library/skills/ddx cli/internal/skills/ddx` passes after skill doc updates.
6. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/registry/... -run 'TestDoctor_ReportsBothInstallLayers|TestDoctor_ReportsInstallTopology|TestDoctorHookPathsDoesNotInvokeFullScope|TestDoctorScopedSkillValidationIgnoresInstallLayer|TestSkillInstallTopologyDocsMentionGlobalProjectAndPrecedence' -count=1` passes.
7. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/registry/...` passes.
8. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
